retry_reason: Not applicable for an unconditional put — there is no failure path; retrying would cause a double-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: releases one reference to the skb by calling kfree_skb. After this call, the caller must not access the skb, as it may have been freed if the reference count reached zero. The caller is expected to hold a valid reference before calling; no return value to check.
